title: anthoxanthum odoratum subsp. alpinum
intro: Anthoxanthum odoratum subsp. alpinum, also known as sweet vernal grass, is a subspecies of the Anthoxanthum odoratum plant, a type of grass that is native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its antispasmodic and expectorant properties. The health benefits of sweet vernal grass include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and soothing respiratory issues. Sweet vernal grass can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory problems and promote relaxation.
